Description.SourceString: A thick and tasty stew, rich in flavour and nutrients. Bramblemead’s head chef, Leander, use to say that eating this stew is like sitting around a warm fire with friends, the aroma of the rich gravy filling your nostrils makes you feel like you’re home. Villagers would gather when he made a big cauldron of the stew, each of them ready for an evening with friends.
